attempt.proof_or_counterexample_mode: second-lift compact-coordinate closure or persistent-chain extraction
attempt.attempt: Lift the top compact mixed transition keys one more 4-bit layer, test smaller pre-outcome coordinates, and record whether pressure re-enters the mixed-key frontier.

candidate_coordinate_rows.description: Compact coordinate plus last four observed valuations.
Compact coordinate plus last eight observed valuations.
Compact coordinate plus tail4 and residue mod 2^8.
Compact coordinate plus tail8 and residue mod 2^12.
Compact coordinate plus tail12 and residue mod 2^16.
Full observed valuation word plus residue mod 2^16; included only as an overfit guard.

infinite_frontier_lift_closure_audit.discarded_route: Treat the full-word bounded separator as an infinite proof. TICKET72 keeps it only as an overfit guard and asks whether compact coordinates close under future lifts.
infinite_frontier_lift_closure_audit.retained_route: Use compact coordinates only if their transition keys close under lift. Otherwise retain the repeated mixed-key re-entry as a candidate counterexample-chain specification.
infinite_frontier_lift_closure_audit.candidate_theorem: InfiniteFrontierCoordinateLiftClosureOrChain: every future lift of the compact mixed-key frontier is separated by a fixed compact pre-outcome coordinate with a well-founded rank, or a compatible infinite chain re-enters mixed pressure keys indefinitely.
infinite_frontier_lift_closure_audit.counterexample_target: A compatible lift chain whose transition keys keep re-entering the compact mixed frontier while every tested compact coordinate remains mixed or high-cardinality.
infinite_frontier_lift_closure_audit.proof_boundary: TICKET72 does not prove Collatz and does not certify a counterexample. It is a bounded second-lift and capped third-lift audit that sharpens the infinite theorem or chain target.

attempt.obstruction: The top mixed keys still need a horizon-independent theorem. Bounded second-lift closure or re-entry statistics are not a proof until they are promoted to a compact invariant or a certified infinite chain.
attempt.candidate_theorem: InfiniteFrontierCoordinateLiftClosureOrChain: every future lift of the compact mixed-key frontier is separated by a fixed compact pre-outcome coordinate with a well-founded rank, or a compatible infinite chain re-enters mixed pressure keys indefinitely.
attempt.next_experiment: Promote the best compact split into a symbolic invariant, or extend the persistent mixed-key chain search.
attempt.claim_boundary: No Collatz proof and no certified Collatz counterexample.

claim_boundary: No Collatz proof and no certified Collatz counterexample.
